003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.commons.lang;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021
022import java.util.concurrent.atomic.*;
023
024import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
025
026/**
027 * A simple mutable long value.
028 *
029 * <p>
030 * This class extends {@link Holder}&lt;{@link Long}&gt; and adds a convenience method for incrementing
031 * the value, which is useful for counting operations in lambdas and loops.
032 *
033 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
034 *    <li class='note'>
035 *       This class is <b>not thread-safe</b>. For concurrent access, use {@link AtomicLong} instead.
036 * </ul>
037 *
038 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
039 * <p class='bjava'>
040 *    <jc>// Create a counter</jc>
041 *    LongHolder <jv>counter</jv> = LongHolder.<jsm>create</jsm>();
042 *
043 *    <jc>// Use in a lambda to count valid items</jc>
044 *    list.forEach(<jv>x</jv> -&gt; {
045 *       <jk>if</jk> (<jv>x</jv>.isValid()) {
046 *          <jv>counter</jv>.getAndIncrement();
047 *       }
048 *    });
049 *
050 *    <jsm>log</jsm>(<js>"Valid items: "</js> + <jv>counter</jv>.get());
051 * </p>
052 *
053 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
054 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauCommonsLang">Lang Package</a>
055 * </ul>
056 */
057@SuppressWarnings({
058   "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
059})
060public class LongHolder extends Holder<Long> {
061
062   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
063   private static final String ARG_values = "values";
064
065   /**
066    * Creates a new long value initialized to <c>0</c>.
067    *
068    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
069    * <p class='bjava'>
070    *    LongHolder <jv>counter</jv> = LongHolder.<jsm>create</jsm>();
071    *    <jsm>assertEquals</jsm>(0L, <jv>counter</jv>.get());
072    * </p>
073    *
074    * @return A new long value.
075    */
076   public static LongHolder create() {
077      return of(0L);
078   }
079
080   /**
081    * Creates a new long value with the specified initial value.
082    *
083    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
084    * <p class='bjava'>
085    *    LongHolder <jv>counter</jv> = LongHolder.<jsm>of</jsm>(42L);
086    *    <jsm>assertEquals</jsm>(42L, <jv>counter</jv>.get());
087    * </p>
088    *
089    * @param value The initial value.
090    * @return A new long value.
091    */
092   public static LongHolder of(Long value) {
093      return new LongHolder(value);
094   }
095
096   /**
097    * Constructor.
098    *
099    * @param value The initial value.
100    */
101   public LongHolder(Long value) {
102      super(value);
103   }
104
105   /**
106    * Adds the specified value to the current value.
107    *
108    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
109    * <p class='bjava'>
110    *    LongHolder <jv>value</jv> = LongHolder.<jsm>of</jsm>(10L);
111    *    <jv>value</jv>.add(5L);
112    *    <jsm>assertEquals</jsm>(15L, <jv>value</jv>.get());
113    * </p>
114    *
115    * @param x The value to add.
116    * @return This object.
117    */
118   public LongHolder add(Long x) {
119      var v = get();
120      set((v == null ? 0L : v) + (x == null ? 0L : x));
121      return this;
122   }
123
124   /**
125    * Adds the specified value to the current value and returns the new value.
126    *
127    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
128    * <p class='bjava'>
129    *    LongHolder <jv>value</jv> = LongHolder.<jsm>of</jsm>(10L);
130    *    <jk>long</jk> <jv>result</jv> = <jv>value</jv>.addAndGet(5L);  <jc>// Returns 15L</jc>
131    *    <jsm>assertEquals</jsm>(15L, <jv>value</jv>.get());
132    * </p>
133    *
134    * @param x The value to add.
135    * @return The new value after addition.
136    */
137   public Long addAndGet(Long x) {
138      var v = get();
139      var result = (v == null ? 0L : v) + (x == null ? 0L : x);
140      set(result);
141      return result;
142   }
143
144   /**
145    * Decrements the value by 1.
146    *
147    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
148    * <p class='bjava'>
149    *    LongHolder <jv>counter</jv> = LongHolder.<jsm>of</jsm>(5L);
150    *    <jv>counter</jv>.decrement();
151    *    <jsm>assertEquals</jsm>(4L, <jv>counter</jv>.get());
152    * </p>
153    *
154    * @return This object.
155    */
156   public LongHolder decrement() {
157      var v = get();
158      set((v == null ? 0L : v) - 1L);
159      return this;
160   }
161
162   /**
163    * Decrements the value by 1 and returns the new value.
164    *
165    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
166    * <p class='bjava'>
167    *    LongHolder <jv>counter</jv> = LongHolder.<jsm>of</jsm>(5L);
168    *    <jk>long</jk> <jv>result</jv> = <jv>counter</jv>.decrementAndGet();  <jc>// Returns 4L</jc>
169    *    <jsm>assertEquals</jsm>(4L, <jv>counter</jv>.get());
170    * </p>
171    *
172    * @return The decremented value.
173    */
174   public Long decrementAndGet() {
175      var v = get();
176      var result = (v == null ? 0L : v) - 1L;
177      set(result);
178      return result;
179   }
180
181   /**
182    * Returns the current value and then increments it.
183    *
184    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
185    * <p class='bjava'>
186    *    LongHolder <jv>counter</jv> = LongHolder.<jsm>of</jsm>(5L);
187    *    <jk>long</jk> <jv>current</jv> = <jv>counter</jv>.getAndIncrement();  <jc>// Returns 5L</jc>
188    *    <jk>long</jk> <jv>next</jv> = <jv>counter</jv>.get();                <jc>// Returns 6L</jc>
189    * </p>
190    *
191    * @return The value before it was incremented.
192    */
193   public long getAndIncrement() {
194      var v = get();
195      set(v == null ? 1L : v + 1L);
196      return v == null ? 0L : v;
197   }
198
199   /**
200    * Increments the value by 1.
201    *
202    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
203    * <p class='bjava'>
204    *    LongHolder <jv>counter</jv> = LongHolder.<jsm>of</jsm>(5L);
205    *    <jv>counter</jv>.increment();
206    *    <jsm>assertEquals</jsm>(6L, <jv>counter</jv>.get());
207    * </p>
208    *
209    * @return This object.
210    */
211   public LongHolder increment() {
212      var v = get();
213      set((v == null ? 0L : v) + 1L);
214      return this;
215   }
216
217   /**
218    * Increments the value by 1 and returns the new value.
219    *
220    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
221    * <p class='bjava'>
222    *    LongHolder <jv>counter</jv> = LongHolder.<jsm>of</jsm>(5L);
223    *    <jk>long</jk> <jv>result</jv> = <jv>counter</jv>.incrementAndGet();  <jc>// Returns 6L</jc>
224    *    <jsm>assertEquals</jsm>(6L, <jv>counter</jv>.get());
225    * </p>
226    *
227    * @return The incremented value.
228    */
229   public Long incrementAndGet() {
230      var v = get();
231      var result = (v == null ? 0L : v) + 1L;
232      set(result);
233      return result;
234   }
235
236   /**
237    * Checks if the current value is equal to the specified value.
238    *
239    * <p>
240    * Uses {@link Shorts#eq(Object, Object)} for deep equality comparison, which handles nulls safely.
241    *
242    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
243    * <p class='bjava'>
244    *    LongHolder <jv>value</jv> = LongHolder.<jsm>of</jsm>(42L);
245    *    <jsm>assertTrue</jsm>(<jv>value</jv>.is(42L));
246    *    <jsm>assertFalse</jsm>(<jv>value</jv>.is(43L));
247    * </p>
248    *
249    * @param value The value to compare to.
250    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the current value is equal to the specified value.
251    */
252   @Override
253   public boolean is(Long value) {
254      return eq(get(), value);
255   }
256
257   /**
258    * Checks if the current value matches any of the specified values.
259    *
260    * <p>
261    * Uses {@link Shorts#eq(Object, Object)} for deep equality comparison of each value.
262    *
263    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
264    * <p class='bjava'>
265    *    LongHolder <jv>value</jv> = LongHolder.<jsm>of</jsm>(5L);
266    *    <jsm>assertTrue</jsm>(<jv>value</jv>.isAny(3L, 5L, 7L));
267    *    <jsm>assertFalse</jsm>(<jv>value</jv>.isAny(1L, 2L));
268    * </p>
269    *
270    * @param values The values to compare to.
271    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the current value matches any of the specified values.
272    */
273   public boolean isAny(Long...values) {
274      assertArgNotNull(ARG_values, values);
275      var current = get();
276      for (var value : values)
277         if (eq(current, value))
278            return true;
279      return false;
280   }
281}
